description: Digests with multiple highlights should cover different topics and provide actionable summaries.

output.title: Bi-weekly review: stewardship progress and new partnership lead
output.summary: The coop advanced two field stewardship tasks and received an inbound partnership inquiry from a regional land trust with aligned conservation goals.
output.whyItMatters: The partnership lead could accelerate the coop's land access goal, and stewardship momentum should be maintained while interest is high.
output.suggestedNextStep: Schedule a 15-minute call with the land trust contact and review stewardship photos for archive readiness.
highlights: Completed the spring soil sampling protocol across all three restoration sites.
Received partnership inquiry from Cascadia Land Trust — they are looking for community monitoring partners.
Two archive-ready field reports are waiting for member review before publishing.
